capability_window.capability_slice: Convert skill and route evidence into bounded local lanes that can be validated before activation.

items.name: zhengxi-views
items.title: source-cited public agent skill route candidate
items.summary: Agent Skill package evidence with SKILL.md, skill.yml, references, evals, scripts, source-cited research workflow language, WorkBuddy and MCP automation notes, fund-data retrieval pressure, and explicit non-investment-advice boundary.

items.name: lingbol088-spec-reverse-flow-skill
items.title: Codex reverse-flow workflow skill route candidate
items.summary: Codex and AI Agent reverse engineering skill workflow with skills/reverse-flow/SKILL.md, local sandbox and CTF framing, scripts, install examples, runtime examples, and workflow-gate pressure that must remain skill_route_discovery_first before any secondary workflow interpretation.

items.name: Qwen-AgentWorld
items.title: general agent world model and benchmark signal
items.summary: General agent project with language world model release, AgentWorldBench evaluation benchmark, eval directory, prompts directory, and multi-domain agent environment simulation. It has no skill_route_discovery route hint and needs a local agent harness evaluation lane before any implementation follow-up.
